name: Book of Genesis
descriptionTemplate: {Blessed are the Bones} {Embryo Fusion} +15; the accumulated healing from the {Crimson Furnace} increases with the number of turns, increasing each turn by an amount equal to [Arg1]% of CON (increases with the level of {Blessed are the Bones}); {End of Suffering} Crit. Rate +25%, and you obtain {Prepare 1}.
